risk_if_not_implemented: Without Human Moderation, residual security, compliance, or resilience risk may accumulate, potentially leading to control failures or non-compliance.

compensating_control_1.name: Data Loss Prevention (DLP)
compensating_control_1.description: Automated mechanisms exist to implement Data Loss Prevention (DLP) to protect sensitive information as it is stored, transmitted and processed.
compensating_control_1.justification: Data Loss Prevention (DLP) (NET-17) provides detective monitoring capability that compensates for the absence of Human Moderation (AAT-27.1) by identifying unauthorized, anomalous, or non-compliant activity that the primary control would have prevented. Given the process-oriented nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.

compensating_control_2.name: Event Log Analysis & Triage
compensating_control_2.description: Mechanisms exist to ensure event log reviews include analysis and triage practices that integrate with the organization's established incident response processes.
compensating_control_2.justification: Event Log Analysis & Triage (MON-17) provides detective monitoring capability that compensates for the absence of Human Moderation (AAT-27.1) by identifying unauthorized, anomalous, or non-compliant activity that the primary control would have prevented. Given the process-oriented nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.
